pr.title: diag: trace multi-Datum writes for test_shard_degradation
pr.body:
- Adds info-level [TRACE-*] log lines across the merge, storage, classification,
  and bonds-validation paths to empirically pinpoint where multi-Datum lands on
  a single-value channel.
- Re-enables test_shard_degradation in CI to trigger the bug under instrumentation.
- Branch base: staging (no other functional changes).

Grep targets after a failing CI run (filter by `[TRACE-*]`):

- `[TRACE-TRIE-WRITE].*channel=<7a7b7766f9...>` — every storage write on the
  channel of interest, with data_len
- `[TRACE-TRIE-WRITE-MULTI]` — explicit flag for any multi-Datum write
- `[TRACE-MERGE-FOLD-*]` / `[TRACE-PRE-STATE-READ]` /
  `[TRACE-PRE-STATE-VIOLATION]` — fold path and pre-state read
- `[TRACE-MAKE-TRIE-ACTION*]` — fallback path
- `[TRACE-DISPATCHER*]` — channel classification decision per merge
- `[TRACE-COMPUTE-MERGED-STATE-*]` / `[TRACE-MERGE-CHANNEL-COMBINE]` —
  per-channel diff aggregation across chains
- `[TRACE-GET-NUMBER-CHANNEL*]` / `[TRACE-GET-NUMBER-CHANNELS-DATA-*]` /
  `[TRACE-UPDATE-MERGEABLE-CHANNELS]` — runtime classification
- `[TRACE-SAVE-MERGEABLE-CHANNELS-*]` / `[TRACE-LOAD-MERGEABLE-CHANNELS-*]` /
  `[TRACE-REPLAY-CACHE-HIT]` — mergeable_store interactions
- `[TRACE-LFS-*]` — LFS state import paths
- `[TRACE-BONDS-CACHE-VALIDATE-*]` / `[TRACE-COMPUTE-BONDS-*]` — bonds
  validation cascade source

Diagnostic only; revert before merging anything functional.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: spreston8
